mapper.select: /* 회의 목록 조회 ai.meeting.selectMeetingList */ SELECT A.MEETING_ID AS MEETING_ID , A.MEETING_TITLE AS MEETING_TITLE , A.ATTENDEES AS ATTENDEES , A.STATUS AS STATUS , B.CODE_NM AS STATUS_NM , A.START_DT AS START_DT , A.END_DT AS END_DT , A.INTEGRATE_YN AS INTEGRATE_YN , A.CREATE_USER_ID AS CREATE_USER_ID , A.CREATE_DT AS CREATE_DT FROM TB_MEETING A LEFT JOIN TB_CODE B ON B.CODE_GRP_ID = 'MT000001' AND B.CODE_ID = A.STATUS WHERE 1=1 AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.CREATE_USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY A.CREATE_DT DESC

/* 회의 단건 조회 ai.meeting.selectMeeting */ SELECT A.MEETING_ID AS MEETING_ID , A.MEETING_TITLE AS MEETING_TITLE , A.ATTENDEES AS ATTENDEES , A.STATUS AS STATUS , B.CODE_NM AS STATUS_NM , A.START_DT AS START_DT , A.END_DT AS END_DT , A.IS_AUTO_TITLE AS IS_AUTO_TITLE , A.INTEGRATE_YN AS INTEGRATE_YN , A.CREATE_USER_ID AS CREATE_USER_ID , A.CREATE_DT AS CREATE_DT FROM TB_MEETING A LEFT JOIN TB_CODE B ON B.CODE_GRP_ID = 'MT000001' AND B.CODE_ID = A.STATUS WHERE 1=1 AND A.MEETING_ID = #{meetingId} AND A.USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.insert: /* 회의 등록 ai.meeting.insertMeeting */ INSERT INTO TB_MEETING (MEETING_TITLE, ATTENDEES, STATUS, START_DT, USE_YN, CREATE_USER_ID, CREATE_DT, IS_AUTO_TITLE, INTEGRATE_YN) VALUES (#{meetingTitle}, #{attendees}, '001', NOW(), 'Y', #{createUserId}, NOW(), #{isAutoTitle}, #{integrateYn})
mapper.delete: /* 회의 물리삭제 ai.meeting.deleteMeeting */ DELETE FROM TB_MEETING WHERE MEETING_ID = #{meetingId}
/* 회의록 물리삭제 ai.meeting.deleteMeetingMinutes */ DELETE FROM TB_MEETING_MINUTES WHERE MEETING_ID = #{meetingId}
/* 인포그래픽 물리삭제 ai.meeting.deleteInfographicByMeetingIdPhysical */ DELETE FROM TB_MEETING_INFOGRAPHIC WHERE MEETING_ID = #{meetingId}
mapper.select: /* 회의록 조회 ai.meeting.selectMeetingMinutes */ SELECT MINUTES_ID AS MINUTES_ID , MEETING_ID AS MEETING_ID , FULL_TEXT AS FULL_TEXT , FLAT_DATA AS FLAT_DATA , GENERATED_CONTENT AS GENERATED_CONTENT , EDITED_CONTENT AS EDITED_CONTENT , CREATE_DT AS CREATE_DT , MODIFY_DT AS MODIFY_DT FROM TB_MEETING_MINUTES WHERE MEETING_ID = #{meetingId}

/* 회의록 조회 ai.meeting.selectMeetingMinutesByMeetingId */ SELECT MINUTES_ID, MEETING_ID, FULL_TEXT, FLAT_DATA, EDITED_CONTENT, GENERATED_CONTENT, CREATE_DT, MODIFY_DT FROM TEAM_AGENT.TB_MEETING_MINUTES WHERE MEETING_ID IN
#{id}
mapper.insert: /* 회의록 등록 ai.meeting.insertMeetingMinutes */ INSERT INTO TB_MEETING_MINUTES (MEETING_ID, FULL_TEXT, FLAT_DATA, GENERATED_CONTENT, CREATE_DT) VALUES (#{meetingId}, #{fullText}, #{flatData}, #{generatedContent}, NOW())
mapper.select: /* 회의별 인포그래픽 조회 ai.meeting.selectMeetingInfographicList */ SELECT INFOGRAPHIC_ID AS INFOGRAPHIC_ID , MEETING_ID AS MEETING_ID , TOPIC_NM AS TOPIC_NM , TOPIC_SUMMARY AS TOPIC_SUMMARY , TREE_TEXT AS TREE_TEXT , INFOGRAPHIC_IMG AS INFOGRAPHIC_IMG , SORT_ORD AS SORT_ORD , STATUS AS INFOGRAPHIC_STATUS , CREATE_DT AS CREATE_DT , MODIFY_DT AS MODIFY_DT FROM TB_MEETING_INFOGRAPHIC WHERE 1=1 AND MEETING_ID = #{meetingId} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SORT_ORD ASC, INFOGRAPHIC_ID ASC
mapper.update: /* 회의별 인포그래픽 논리삭제 ai.meeting.deleteMeetingInfographicByMeetingId */ UPDATE TB_MEETING_INFOGRAPHIC SET USE_YN = 'N' , MODIFY_DT = NOW() WHERE 1=1 AND MEETING_ID = #{meetingId} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.insert: /* 인포그래픽 등록 ai.meeting.insertMeetingInfographic */ INSERT INTO TB_MEETING_INFOGRAPHIC (MEETING_ID, TOPIC_NM, TOPIC_SUMMARY, TREE_TEXT, INFOGRAPHIC_IMG, SORT_ORD, STATUS, USE_YN, CREATE_DT) VALUES (#{meetingId}, #{topicNm}, #{topicSummary}, #{treeText}, #{infographicImg}, #{sortOrd}, #{infographicStatus}, 'Y', NOW())
mapper.select: /* 화자 목록 조회 ai.meeting.selectSpeakerList */ SELECT SPEAKER_ID AS SPEAKER_ID , MEETING_ID AS MEETING_ID , SPEAKER_LABEL AS SPEAKER_LABEL , SPEAKER_NM AS SPEAKER_NM , USER_ID AS SPEAKER_USER_ID , UTTERANCES AS UTTERANCES , CREATE_DT AS CREATE_DT FROM TB_MEETING_SPEAKER WHERE MEETING_ID = #{meetingId} ORDER BY SPEAKER_ID ASC
mapper.insert: /* 화자 등록 ai.meeting.insertSpeaker */ INSERT INTO TB_MEETING_SPEAKER (MEETING_ID, SPEAKER_LABEL, SPEAKER_NM, USER_ID, UTTERANCES, CREATE_DT) VALUES (#{meetingId}, #{speakerLabel}, #{speakerNm}, #{speakerUserId}, #{utterances}, NOW())

/* 오디오 파일 등록 ai.meeting.insertMeetingAudio */ INSERT INTO TB_MEETING_AUDIO (MEETING_ID, FILE_PATH, ORIGINAL_FILENAME, FILE_EXT, FILE_SIZE, STATUS, CREATE_DT) VALUES (#{meetingId}, #{filePath}, #{originalFilename}, #{fileExt}, #{fileSize}, '001', NOW())
mapper.select: /* 오디오 파일 조회 ai.meeting.selectMeetingAudio */ SELECT A.AUDIO_ID , A.MEETING_ID , A.FILE_PATH , A.ORIGINAL_FILENAME , A.FILE_EXT , A.FILE_SIZE , A.DURATION_SEC , A.STATUS , A.ERROR_MSG , A.CREATE_DT , A.MODIFY_DT FROM TB_MEETING_AUDIO A WHERE 1=1 AND A.MEETING_ID = #{meetingId}
/* 참석자 선택용 사용자 목록 ai.meeting.selectUserListForMeeting */ SELECT USER_ID AS CREATE_USER_ID , USER_NM AS USER_NM FROM TB_USER WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY USER_NM ASC
mapper.update: /* Cancel Beacon: 비정상종료(취소) 처리 ai.meeting.updateMeetingCancelAbnormal */ UPDATE TB_MEETING SET STATUS = '003' , ABNORMAL_YN = 'Y' , END_DT = NOW() , MODIFY_DT = NOW() WHERE MEETING_ID = #{meetingId}

/* 스케줄러: Heartbeat 미수신 진행중 회의 비정상종료 처리 ai.meeting.updateExpiredMeetingsAbnormal */ UPDATE TB_MEETING SET ABNORMAL_YN = 'Y' , STATUS = '003' , END_DT = NOW() , MODIFY_DT = NOW() WHERE STATUS = '001' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND LAST_HEARTBEAT_DT IS NOT NULL AND LAST_HEARTBEAT_DT < NOW() - INTERVAL 3 MINUTE
/* 복구 완료: 비정상종료 플래그 해제 및 종료 처리 ai.meeting.updateMeetingRecover */ UPDATE TB_MEETING SET ABNORMAL_YN = 'N' , STATUS = '002' , END_DT = NOW() , MODIFY_DT = NOW() WHERE MEETING_ID = #{meetingId}
mapper.select: /* 비정상종료 회의 목록 조회 ai.meeting.selectAbnormalMeetingList */ SELECT MEETING_ID AS MEETING_ID , MEETING_TITLE AS MEETING_TITLE , START_DT AS START_DT , END_DT AS END_DT FROM TB_MEETING WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND ABNORMAL_YN = 'Y' AND CREATE_USER_ID = #{createUserId} ORDER BY CREATE_DT DESC

/* 해당 회의가 원본인 통합 회의록 조회 ai.meeting.selectIntegrationByChildMeetingId */ SELECT m.MEETING_ID AS MEETING_ID , m.MEETING_TITLE AS MEETING_TITLE FROM TB_MEETING_INTEGRATION i JOIN TB_MEETING m ON m.MEETING_ID = i.PARENT_MEETING_ID WHERE i.CHILD_MEETING_ID = #{meetingId}
mapper.delete: /* 통합 연결 삭제 (원본 삭제 시) ai.meeting.deleteIntegrationByChildMeetingId */ DELETE FROM TB_MEETING_INTEGRATION WHERE CHILD_MEETING_ID = #{meetingId}
/* 통합 연결 삭제 (통합 회의록 삭제 시) ai.meeting.deleteIntegrationByParentMeetingId */ DELETE FROM TB_MEETING_INTEGRATION WHERE PARENT_MEETING_ID = #{meetingId}
mapper.select: /* 통합 회의 원본 목록 조회 ai.meeting.selectMeetingIntegrationList */ SELECT m.MEETING_ID AS MEETING_ID , m.MEETING_TITLE AS MEETING_TITLE , m.START_DT AS START_DT , m.END_DT AS END_DT , m.STATUS AS STATUS FROM TB_MEETING_INTEGRATION i JOIN TB_MEETING m ON m.MEETING_ID = i.CHILD_MEETING_ID WHERE i.PARENT_MEETING_ID = #{meetingId} AND m.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY i.CREATE_DT ASC
mapper.insert:
/* 회의록 통합 등록 ai.meeting.insertMeetingIntegration */ INSERT INTO TB_MEETING_INTEGRATION ( PARENT_MEETING_ID, CHILD_MEETING_ID, CREATE_DT ) VALUES
( #{parentMeetingId}, #{childId}, NOW() )
